item.title: New
item.description:
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/aplayer/dist/APlayer.min.css"> <style type="text/css">
.dark-theme .aplayer { background: #212121; } .dark-theme .aplayer.aplayer-withlist .aplayer-info { border-bottom-color: #5c5c5c; }
</style> <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/aplayer/dist/APlayer.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/meting@2.0.1/dist/Meting.min.js"></script>
<meting-js id="13262135451" server="netease" type="playlist" fixed="false" mini="false" autoplay="true" loop="true" theme="#255579" volume="0.6" preload="auto" mutex="true" list-folded="true"> </meting-js>
